---
title: "Day 4 (Thursday): Advanced Models, Preprocessing, and Evaluation"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../assets/css/slides-theme.scss]
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    scrollable: true
    slide-level: 2
    html-math-method: katex
---

## Learning objectives

- Find **model specs and hyperparameters** in **`parsnip`** / [tidymodels.org](https://www.tidymodels.org/find/parsnip/)
- Explain **bagging (random forests)** and **boosting (XGBoost)** and see boosting **sharpen** a decision boundary round by round
- Add **PCA**, **imputation**, and **upsampling** as **recipe steps** inside the same **`workflow()`** as Tuesday
- Fit a **small neural network** with the same resampling discipline
- Read **variable importance** and connect **metrics / SHAP** to deployment questions (not causation)

## Navigation

- [Teaching Hub](../index.qmd)
- [Curriculum Outline](../curriculum-outline.qmd)
- [Module 05 — Advanced models](../modules/module-05-advanced-models.qmd)
- [Module 08 — Compare learners](../modules/module-08-penguins-compare-models.qmd)
- [Back: Tuesday deck](day-02-tuesday.qmd)

## Same template as Tuesday — swap the engine

- **`peng_cls`:** Adelie vs Gentoo; **bill + island + sex + year** (same as [Module 04](../modules/module-04-pipeline.qmd#canonical-pipeline-tuesday))
- Keep **`recipe()` + `workflow()` + `fit_resamples()`** — change **`parsnip` spec** and optional recipe steps (PCA, impute, upsample)

{{< include ../_includes/day04-penguins-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-model-catalog.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-ensembles-boosting.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-boosting-boundary-steps.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-pca-recipe.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-mlp-quick.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-vip-importance.qmd >}}

{{< include ../_includes/day04-impute-balance.qmd >}}

## Metrics toolbox (when accuracy lies)

- **Accuracy:** fine when classes are balanced and errors cost the same
- **Precision / recall / F1:** screening vs confirmation
- **ROC-AUC:** ranking across thresholds
- **PR-AUC:** often clearer when the positive class is **rare**
- Details: [Module 07](../modules/module-07-penguins-choose-metrics.qmd)

## SHAP and local explanations (pointers)

- **SHAP:** which inputs pushed **this** prediction away from a baseline — **communication**, not causation
- **TreeSHAP** for forests/boosting; **KernelSHAP** for other engines
- Limits and plots: [Module 06](../modules/module-06-evaluation-and-interpretability.qmd) · prior prose in curriculum

## Nested resampling (when tuning gets serious)

- **Outer** CV for performance; **inner** CV for hyperparameters inside each analysis fold
- Avoid tuning and scoring on the same held-out rows

## End-of-day checklist

- Where do you look up **`tune()`** knobs for `rand_forest` and `boost_tree`?
- What changes in the **boosting boundary** slides as `trees` increases?
- Why must **`step_impute_*()`** and **`step_pca()`** live **inside** the recipe?
- One reason **VIP** on correlated bills is **not** a causal claim
